details: The agent ran comprehensive cluster commands (triage, pod views, logs, pvc view, svc view) and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root causes: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (DB connection refused), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-init (migration table lock in init container), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (missing fast-ssd StorageClass causing unbound PVC), fault-readiness (readiness probe port mismatch 8080 vs 80), fault-rollout (non-existent image in new rollout), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes), and fault-endpoints (service selector app=web-backend-v2 doesn't match pod labels app=web-backend). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
